name: Knowlarity
description: Indian cloud telephony platform with SuperReceptionist IVR, virtual numbers, voice APIs; acquired by Gupshup.

seo.title: Knowlarity — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Knowlarity: Indian cloud telephony platform with SuperReceptionist IVR, virtual numbers, voice APIs; acquired by Gupshup.

when_to_use: IVR SuperReceptionist for Indian SMB call routing
Virtual number masking for marketplace buyer-seller calls
Outbound voice campaign automation for Indian market
Cloud telephony API for CRM-integrated call center
WhatsApp Business API (via Gupshup) for enterprise

pros: Established IVR and virtual-number footprint in India
SuperReceptionist useful for SMB call handling
Now part of Gupshup, wider channel roadmap
Reasonable pricing for Indian SMB telephony
cons: Product polish dated in several areas
Outside India, almost no meaningful presence
Docs and APIs not the most developer-friendly
review.verdict: Long-running Indian cloud telephony brand now inside Gupshup — solid for IVR, future direction unclear.
review.best_for: Indian SMBs needing virtual numbers, IVR and basic call tracking
review.not_for: Global teams or devs wanting crisp, modern telephony APIs
